full_text:
Empress Fu Shou 伏壽皇后
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Fu Shou (伏壽皇后). Wife of Emperor Xian. From Langya. Daughter of Fu Wan. Executed by Cao Cao. Empress Fu Shou was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Empress Fu Shou lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
